message:
chore: add storage.sqlite3 and stray junk file to .gitignore

Prevents runtime SQLite databases and the spurious `=` file (likely
from a shell mis-paste or tool artifact) from showing as untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,3 +24,12 @@ Thumbs.db
 *.log
 *.tmp
 *.bak
+
+# Runtime SQLite databases
+storage.sqlite3
+*.sqlite3-wal
+*.sqlite3-shm
+*.sqlite3-journal
+
+# Stray single-character junk files (editor/tool artifacts)
+/=
